---
name: docs-sync-governance
description: "Keep PLAN.md, ROADMAP.md, and setup docs synchronized with implementation progress, milestones, blockers, and project decisions."
argument-hint: "Describe what changed and which docs should be updated."
---

# Docs Sync Governance

## When To Use
- After feature delivery, architecture updates, or milestone changes.
- During daily status updates and sprint checkpoint reviews.
- When onboarding docs diverge from actual project structure.

## Procedure
1. Compare implementation changes against PLAN and ROADMAP expectations.
2. Update status, blockers, and next actions with concise, factual wording.
3. Correct outdated setup/reference paths across docs.
4. Run documentation validation scripts and fix warnings.
5. Record any deferred documentation debt explicitly.

## Quality Bar
- Documentation references real existing files.
- Milestones are measurable and current.
- No fabricated progress or unverifiable claims.
